title: Bare Remote Detonators
description: Adds Remote Detonators Which Can Detonate TNT Remotely (Bare Bones Style)
body:
### DISCONTINUED
This mod will not be worked on anymore, play with this mod instead: [Remote Detonators](https://modrinth.com/mod/remote-detonators)

Bare Remote Detonators - is a mod which adds detonators with which you can detonate tnt or other redstone machines.

It is recommended to Use [Bare Bones](https://www.modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) Resource Pack with this mod.

This Mod Was Made With MCreator.
